ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_bins" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic bin */,
  "bin_name" TEXT /* Name of the genomic bin */,
  "marker_lineage" TEXT /* Marker lineage of the genomic bin */,
  "num_genomes" INTEGER /* Number of genomes in the bin */,
  "num_markers" INTEGER /* Number of markers in the bin */,
  "num_marker_sets" INTEGER /* Number of marker sets in the bin */,
  "bin_source" TEXT /* Source of the genomic bin (e.g., metagenomic sequencing, 16S rRNA gene sequencing, whole-genome sequencing) */,
  "bin_size" INTEGER /* Size of the genomic bin in base pairs */,
  "bin_coverage" REAL /* Average coverage of the genomic bin */,
  "bin_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the genomic bin (e.g., based on assembly quality) */,
  "bin_publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the bin was published or made available */,
  "bin_status" TEXT /* Status of the bin (e.g., draft, finalized, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marker_genes" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker gene */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the marker gene */,
  "marker_lineage" TEXT /* Marker lineage of the marker gene */,
  "marker_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the marker gene */,
  "marker_length" INTEGER /* Length of the marker gene in base pairs */,
  "marker_function" TEXT /* Function of the marker gene (e.g., metabolic pathway) */,
  "marker_publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the marker gene was first published or identified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_bin_markers" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic bin */,
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marker gene */,
  "marker_count" INTEGER /* Count of the marker gene in the bin */,
  "marker_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the marker gene in the genomic bin */,
  "marker_coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the marker gene in the genomic bin */,
  "marker_functional_role" TEXT /* Functional role of the marker gene in the genomic bin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id", "marker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomic_classifications" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic bin */,
  "taxonomic_rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank (e.g., kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, species) */,
  "taxonomic_name" TEXT /* Taxonomic name */,
  "classification_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the taxonomic classification */,
  "classification_method" TEXT /* Method used for taxonomic classification (e.g., BLAST, Kraken) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id", "taxonomic_rank")
)

CREATE TABLE "completeness_metrics" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic bin */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness metric (e.g., percentage of marker genes present) */,
  "completeness_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate completeness (e.g., CheckM) */,
  "completeness_score" INTEGER /* Detailed score for completeness (e.g., number of single-copy genes found) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contamination_metrics" (
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic bin */,
  "contamination" REAL /* Contamination metric (e.g., percentage of non-marker genes present) */,
  "contamination_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate contamination (e.g., CheckM) */,
  "contamination_score" INTEGER /* Detailed score for contamination (e.g., number of multi-copy genes found) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_bin_assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic bin */,
  "assembly_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly */,
  "assembly_file" TEXT /* File path to the assembly file */,
  "assembly_method" TEXT /* Method used for assembly (e.g., SPAdes, MEGAHIT) */,
  "assembly_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the assembly (e.g., N50 value) */,
  "assembly_coverage" REAL /* Average coverage of the assembly */,
  "assembly_date" TEXT /* Date when the assembly was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_bin_assemblies_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "researcher_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., institution, university) */,
  "researcher_specialization" TEXT /* Research specialization of the researcher (e.g., genomics, microbiology) */,
  "researcher_orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_bin_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic bin */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the bin */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the bin was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_bin_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_bin_access_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic bin */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., taxonomic, functional) */,
  "annotation_method" TEXT /* Method used for annotation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "annotation_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_bin_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic bin */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_method" TEXT /* Method used to create the version (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_bin_versions_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_bin_quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control event */,
  "bin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic bin */,
  "qc_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality control was performed */,
  "qc_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "qc_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality control (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "qc_performed_by" TEXT /* Researcher who performed the quality control */,
  "qc_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes on the quality control process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_bin_quality_control_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES genomic_bins ("bin_id")
)
